title: VeloraOS 1.9.3 - Logo Visibility Hotfix
releaseNotes: Restores the VLOS SVG wordmark in the top-left header.
Keeps the duplicate VeloraOS text and local-appliance tagline hidden.
Keeps installed-only Chat model selection and all v1.9.2 behaviour unchanged.
Preserves users, chats, settings, avatars, models, licensing files and device identity.
